SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: HSIANG, JUSTIN SUBSTITUTED FOR PRO PER AS ATTORNEY FOR BRADY, JESSICA JOYCE

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT ALOUF, JOSEPH RECOVER FROM APPELLANT BRADY, JESSICA JOYCE $80.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $125.00, THE PRINCIPAL REPRESENTS ONE-HALF OF UTILITIES FOR NOVEMBER 2018.UNDER THE TERMS OF THE SUB-LEASE, THE SECURITY DEPOSIT WAS FOR DAMAGE ONLY, NOT FOR UNPAID RENT, KEY, CLEANING, OR "OTHER".RENT FOR DECEMBER 2018 WAS NOT DUE BECAUSE APPELLANT MOVED OUT WITH RESPONDENT'S KNOWLEDGE AND CONSENT AS EVIDENCED BY HIS 3-DAY NOTICE TO QUIT OR CURE.THE COMPLAINT DOES NOT ACT AS A SUBSTITUTE FOR RESPONDENT'S OBLIGATION TO SERVE A CIV.C. 1950.5(G) COMPLIANT LETTER ON APPELLANT BECAUSE IT IS NOT ITEMIZED. PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-02-2019 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Respondent/Plaintiff Joseph Alouf appeared in pro per.
Justin C. Hsiang appeared on behalf of Appellant/Defendant Jessica Joyce Brady, also present.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties sworn.

Respondent/Plaintiff Mr. Alouf testifies on his own behalf.
Mr. Hsiang makes an oral motion requesting the court consolidate this matter with a related case. Court denies the motion.
Mr. Hsiang argues the case on behalf of Appellant/Defendant Ms. Brady.
Appellant/Defendant Ms. Brady testifies on her own behalf.
The following documentary evidence is introduced:

Appellant/Defendant's Group Exhibit A: Document titled "Evidence for Defendant's Small Claims Case."
Respondent/Plaintiff's Group Exhibit 1: Documents including Email from Joe Alouf to Jessica Joyce-Brady, 30-Day Notice of Intent to Vacate, texts between the parties.

Respondent's and Appellant's exhibits retained by the Court.

The matter is taken under submission.
Dept. 525; Judge Pro Tem: Elliott Myles; Clerk: J. Bertelsen; Not reported.

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jul-11-2019 Continued To Aug-01-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar May-10-2019 Granted With Continuance
